hero.sub: A private roundtable series for senior leaders in RPA, AI, and Agentic Automation — designed for peer learning, meaningful connections, and practical outcomes. No vendor pitches. No theory. Just honest, high-value conversation.

community.label: The Community
community.sub: Every seat is earned. Attendees are hand-picked for seniority, relevance, and expertise. Small by design — so every conversation counts and every connection is real.
community.card1body: 10–20 carefully selected senior professionals per session. No mass invites. No random attendees. Every participant is chosen intentionally.
community.card2body: A focused 20-minute slot to present, demonstrate and open discussion — a conversation starter, never a sales pitch.
community.card3body: Facilitated peer discussion around real challenges in AI & automation. Candid, experience-led, and practically focused.
community.card4body: Informal close with drinks and food. Real introductions over a glass of wine — not badge-swapping at a booth.

different.label: What Makes This Different
different.item1body: Technology is discussed on its merits. Attendees come to learn and share — not to be sold to. Your 20-minute slot is a conversation starter, not a sales deck.
different.item2body: Every seat is earned, not bought. Hand-picked for seniority, relevance, and diversity. One of the most inclusive senior tech communities in Switzerland.
different.item3body: We don't favour any stack or vendor. Honest, unbiased peer exchange. People share what's actually working — and what isn't — without agenda.

audience.label: Who Attends
audience.headline: Senior professionals from Switzerland's leading organisations.
audience.sub: These are the people shaping AI and automation strategy at scale — Heads of AI, CTOs, VP Technology, and Innovation Directors from some of Switzerland's most recognised names.
audience.quote: "Your prospects are already in the room. Senior AI and automation leaders in Switzerland are actively evaluating new tools and partnerships — but they're not attending mass conferences. They're gathering in trusted, curated circles."

mark.label: The Founder
mark.name: Mark Ross
mark.bio: I started this community because I kept having the same conversation: brilliant people working on RPA, automation, and AI — but doing it in silos. No real space to share what's actually working, what isn't, and where things are heading. So I built one.
mark.quote: "InnovateInDigital brings together business & technology leaders for honest, high-quality conversations — where real experience gets shared, not just polished presentations."
mark.cred2rest: — built functions & ecosystems from the ground up

sponsors.label: For Sponsors & Partners
sponsors.sub: InnovateInDigital offers a unique partnership model — direct access to senior AI and automation decision-makers in Switzerland. No cash fee. Just genuine partnership.
sponsors.perk2: 20-minute speaking platform — demo, case study, or Q&A
sponsors.perk3: Brand positioning in a premium, trust-first community
sponsors.boxSub: Request our Sponsor Information Pack — we'll send it directly and schedule a short conversation.

apps.label: Agentic AI Applications
apps.sub: Beyond events, InnovateInDigital is developing a curated suite of Agentic AI applications — practical tools designed for the professionals in the room. Starting with Automation Manager.

cta.label: Ready to Join?
cta.sub: Every seat is curated. If you're a senior leader working in AI, Automation, or Agentic technology in Switzerland — we'd love to meet you.
